task_description: Implement S44N (14 Day Trial UI with trial banner and subscription screen), S44O (Annual Pricing toggle with animated price switching), and S44P (Usage Percentage Tracker with provider and sidebar widget)

verification.summary: All 3 features implemented. Review fixes applied: copyWith error semantics fixed with clearError parameter, Semantics wrappers added to billing toggles. Flutter SDK not available in sandbox for flutter analyze, but code verified via manual review for strict null safety, correct imports, no dynamic types, proper error handling, and pattern compliance with existing codebase.
